targets.query:
from(bucket: "habitat_sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "scd40")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric"] == "co2_ppm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "habitat_sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "bme280" or r["_measurement"] == "scd40")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric"] == "temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "habitat_sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "bme280" or r["_measurement"] == "scd40")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric"] == "hum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "habitat_sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "max30100")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric"] == "hr_bpm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
